info.title: Ledga Financial Ledger API
info.description:
Double-entry accounting ledger system with multi-tenancy support.
 *
 * ## Features
 * - Double-entry accounting with immutable transactions
 * - Multi-tenant isolation with tenant-scoped data
 * - Multi-currency support (fiat and cryptocurrencies)
 * - Configurable precision and rounding modes
 * - Transaction codes for standardized entry templates
 * - Account sets for grouped reporting
 * - Real-time balance calculations
 *
 * ## Authentication
 * All API endpoints require authentication via Laravel Sanctum bearer tokens.
 *
 * ## Monetary Values
 * - All monetary amounts are stored as integer minor units (pence/cents/satoshis)
 * - API accepts and returns decimal strings for user-facing values
 * - Precision is configurable per ledger (storage_decimals and display_decimals)
 *
 * ## Pagination
 * List endpoints use cursor-based pagination for consistency.
 * See docs/api/PAGINATION.md for details.

get.summary: List all accounts in a ledger
get.description:
Display a listing of accounts

Uses cursor-based pagination for consistency. See docs/api/PAGINATION.md
For hierarchical view, use tree=true parameter.

code.description: Account code (must be unique within ledger)

normal_balance.description: Normal balance side (defaults based on type)

parent_id.description: Parent account UUID for hierarchical structure

category.description: Account category — system (internal/GL) or customer (end-user balance)

get.description: Display the specified account
Get account balance history

post.summary: Initialize default chart of accounts for a ledger

get.summary: Get all entries for an account with rolling balance
get.description:
Get all entries for an account with rolling balance calculation

Returns entries in chronological order by effective_date with a calculated
balance_after field showing the running balance after each entry.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Filter entries up to this date (inclusive)

get.summary: Get a specific account by its code
get.description: Display the specified account by code

get.summary: Get account balance by code with layer details
get.description: Get account balance by code with layer details

parameters.name: as_of_date
parameters.description: Calculate balance as of this date

get.summary: Get account balance with layer details
get.description:
Get account balance with layer details

Returns balances for each accounting layer (settled, pending) plus
encumbrance breakdown (overdue, future). Per issue #86, the "available"
balance concept was removed - only settled funds are spendable.

parameters.name: as_of_date
parameters.description: Calculate balance as of this date (Y-m-d format)

parameters.name: layer
parameters.description: Filter by specific layer (informational only, all layers are always returned)

get.description:
Display a listing of account sets

Uses cursor-based pagination for consistency. See docs/api/PAGINATION.md

post.description: Store a newly created account set

get.description: Display the specified account set

post.summary: Add an account or nested set to this account set
post.description: Add a member to the account set

member_id.description: UUID of account or account set

delete.summary: Remove an account or nested set from this account set
delete.description: Remove a member from the account set

404.description: Account set or member not found

get.summary: Get aggregated balance for all accounts in this set
get.description: Get aggregated balance for the account set

get.summary: Get all accounts in this set (recursively includes nested sets)
get.description: Get all accounts in the account set (recursively)
Display a listing of journals for a ledger.
Display the specified journal.

409.description: Cannot delete journal with existing transactions

get.description: Get journal statistics.
Returns all system accounts with their debit/credit balances, plus a rollup of all user accounts. Ensures debits equal credits.

parameters.name: as_of_date
parameters.description: Report balances as of this date

get.description: Returns revenue and expense accounts for a date range, grouped by system accounts and customer accounts. Calculates net income.

parameters.name: from_date
parameters.description: Start date for the report period

parameters.name: to_date
parameters.description: End date for the report period

get.description: Display a listing of tranCodes for the specified ledger.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search in code, name, or description

get.summary: Get a specific transaction code template
get.description: Display the specified tranCode.

put.summary: Update a transaction code template (increments version)
put.description:
Update the specified tranCode.
Note: Updates increment the version number for audit trail.

get.summary: List all transactions in a ledger
get.description:
Display a listing of the resource.

Uses cursor-based pagination for consistency. See docs/api/PAGINATION.md

post.description:
Store a newly created resource in storage.

Optimized for speed: Direct database insertion with async verification.
Returns 202 Accepted immediately, with verification happening asynchronously.

idempotency_key.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate transactions

post.summary: Create multiple transactions in a batch
post.description: Create multiple transactions in a single API request. Each transaction is processed independently, supporting partial success. Maximum 100 transactions per batch (configurable).

idempotency_key.description: Unique key for idempotency (required per transaction)

get.description: Display the specified resource.

Account.title: Account
Account.description: A chart of accounts entry for tracking financial transactions

category.description: Account category — system (internal/GL accounts) or customer (end-user balance accounts)

AccountSet.title: Account Set
AccountSet.description: A logical grouping of accounts for reporting purposes

Entry.title: Entry
Entry.description: A single entry in a double-entry transaction

Journal.title: Journal
Journal.description: A journal for organizing related transactions

Ledger.title: Ledger
Ledger.description: A financial ledger containing chart of accounts and transactions

total_amount.description: Total transaction amount in major units

TransactionCode.title: Transaction Code
TransactionCode.description: A reusable template for creating transactions with parameters

AccountBalanceResponse.title: Account Balance Response
AccountBalanceResponse.description: Layered balance snapshot for a single account. Per issue #86, "available" was removed — only settled funds are spendable. Encumbrances are split into overdue (past due date) and future (due today or later).

success.description: Structured response for account balance endpoint

settled.description: Confirmed cleared funds — what you can spend

tags.name: Account Sets
